PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-01-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Shaver appeared by telephone for Barbara Krusi.

The Court noted that there is an issue of not having an original will and the issue of bond. Mr. Shaver explained that they are dealing the peculiarity of Texas title transfer law. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-10-2017 Continued To May-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
